title: SOI - BDAria Fusion Cell Sorter - Instrument Startup
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ra14","text":"This Standard Operation Instruction is intended to guide the facility users to perform a fluidics start-up on a BD FACSAria Fusion™ instrument","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fotc9","text":"This protocol should be done by:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1outm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cs1gl","text":"The faciity staff","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fn3ru","text":"Trained users of the FCCF.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ljd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eklgh","text":"This protocol should be performed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3tern","text":"Everyday (assuming a Fluidics shutdown was done on the previous day).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ifla","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"an0q3","text":"Perform the steps subsequently unless otherwise stated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"d30gf","text":"Be sure to wear gloves and lab coat at all times! \nGeneral rule: spray 70% ethanol in all connectors before plugging any tubing!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":128}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4tqqb","text":"Handle FACSClean carefully. It should't enter in contact with the skin and eyes (wear gloves, lab coat and glasses) and it ruins colorful clothes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
